content_body:
A mountain vacation would not be a mountain vacation without catching up on some much-needed relaxing. The beautiful scenery, the crisp air, the slower pace, add to the mountain wellness experience. If treating yourself to some self-care is in the works for your North Georgia vacation, look no further than our recommendation for spas and wellness activities! Whether an in-cabin massage, rejuvenating facial, or private yoga session is the key to your well-being, Blue Ridge spas have something for everyone.

Serenity in the Mountains Spa

Located just a few minutes from downtown Blue Ridge, Serenity in the Mountains Spa is a top-rated spa that offers a wide range of services to help you reset, relax, and recenter. From massages and facials to body treatments and nail services, this spa has it all! If a spa day is on your North Georgia Bucket List, a trip to Serenity in the Mountains is a must for your spa vacation.

Signature Treatments

One of the most popular treatments at Serenity in the Mountains is their "Signature Massage." This 60-minute massage combines various techniques and hot stones to release tension and promote peace. The best part: Any of their treatments can be given in their Treehouse for no extra cost! They also offer a whole host of facials that uses organic products to cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate the skin.

Tea Tree Spa

Nestled right in the heart of downtown Blue Ridge, Tea Tree Boutique Spa is a tranquil retreat that offers a variety of spa services and add-ons. Their experienced therapists use natural and organic products to provide a truly rejuvenating experience. In addition to traditional spa treatments, they also offer group perks (complimentary refreshments for large groups), in-cabin massages (within 10 miles), and more!

Wellness Treatments

Emphasizing a well-rounded assortment of treatments, Tea Tree boasts a variety of aromatherapy, CBD, and natural techniques to add a special touch to your massage or facial. Make sure to check out their scrubs, body wraps, pedicures and more!

Yoga Over Blue Ridge

For those looking for a more active approach to wellness, Yoga Over Blue Ridge offers an assortment of yoga classes in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains. These classes are held at various locations throughout the area, including on the banks of the Toccoa River and at local wineries. It's a unique and refreshing way to connect with nature while also taking care of your mind and body.

Private Sessions

If you prefer a more personalized experience, Yoga Over Blue Ridge also offers private yoga parties. These can be tailored to your specific needs and can be held at your luxury cabin! Bring the experience to you and experience a memorable mountain retreat.

Blue Ridge, GA is not only a beautiful destination for outdoor adventures, but it's also a haven for those seeking relaxation and rejuvenation. With a variety of top-rated spas and wellness activities, there's something for everyone in our charming mountain town. So why not plan a trip to Blue Ridge and treat yourself to some much-needed self-care? Your mind, body, and soul will thank you.

Reserve one of our luxury cabins online or over the phone (706-432-2140) today and start counting down to your mountain escape!
title: Relax and Rejuvenate: The Best Spas in Blue Ridge, GA
